description: SHA-256 hashes of critical files for drift detection. Regenerate after intentional changes.

src/cve_mcp/api/tools.py.description: MCP tool definitions and handlers (43 tools)
src/cve_mcp/api/tools.py.drift_impact: critical - tool schema changes break MCP clients

src/cve_mcp/api/schemas.py.drift_impact: high - schema changes affect input validation

src/cve_mcp/mcp/server.py.description: MCP server wrapper with error handling
src/cve_mcp/mcp/server.py.drift_impact: critical - changes affect all tool execution

src/cve_mcp/mcp/transports.py.drift_impact: critical - transport changes break client connectivity

src/cve_mcp/api/app.py.description: FastAPI HTTP wrapper with health endpoint

src/cve_mcp/config.py.drift_impact: medium - config changes may require env updates

manifest.json.description: MCP bundle manifest for package distribution
